title: Spineless
description: This cactus sure is prickly- or is it?
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b13919d06d704f8964ac60531570ea83929991d.png)

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ae1cea116dcab80092a4d2772be3acb560df018.png)

### Ever wanted to eat cacti in Minecraft? Me neither. Well- now you can! 

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ae1cea116dcab80092a4d2772be3acb560df018.png)

### Stripping Cacti

Stripping cacti works very simply- Right clicking a cactus with any axe (or shears, as of 1.2.0) will strip it of it's spines- now that it isn't quite as prickly, what the hell can you do with a naked cactus?

I'm glad you asked.

### Eating Cacti

Eating cacti is also very simple- you can craft the stripped cactus block into 4 cactus flesh items, and they can either be cooked or smoked into cooked cactus flesh!
Cooked cactus flesh is a very good food source- you can eat the flesh raw, but it's significantly less nourishing.

### Cactus Spines

Finally, the spines you get after stripping a cactus are a reliable fuel source. They don't burn for very long, but you get quite a lot of spines per cactus!

### Please report any issues, however small, on the Github [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/bency-mods/Spineless/issues)! You can also suggest features there if you have any ideas!

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ae1cea116dcab80092a4d2772be3acb560df018.png)
